events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: The guitar legend behind some of Queen's biggest anthems is 79 today. Which Brian May riff is your all-time favourite?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your favourite Stones track that still gets you moving?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched 45 years ago today on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV changed music forever! Remember the first video they played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – ironically enough.

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe', originally released on August 29, 1994, is celebrated today.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation. What's your go-to track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began 57 years ago today, in August 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Elvis Presley: 49 Years
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years on. Elvis Presley's legacy is truly unmatched. What's your favourite Elvis song?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: We remember guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Still unmatched on the guitar. Remembering Jimi Hendrix today, a true legend gone too soon.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road at 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, originally released on September 26, 1969, is celebrated today.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: That album cover, those songs. The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is 57 years old. Which track is your favourite from the masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever. What's your top Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy Birthday to Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite track from the man himself?

events.title: The iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple's original iPod, first unveiled on October 23, 2001, is celebrated today.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember carrying your entire music library in your pocket for the first time? The original iPod is 25 years old. A game-changer!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating 007's big screen debut. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite moment from his career?

events.title: The Beatles' White Album at 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'White Album', originally released on November 22, 1968, is celebrated today.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: A double album that changed everything. The Beatles' 'White Album' is 58 years old. Which track is your standout?
